flow_description: Boneless wings flavor selection + combo fries, then switch flavors, add sauces and drinks, then swap fries and remove an item.

transcript.text: Yo!
Welcome to The Burger Joint located at 123 Main St, Anytown, USA! What's your name and what can I get for you today?
I want 6Pc Boneless.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless. Is that all?
Flavor: Garlic Parm.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Garlic Parm. Is that all?
Make it a combo with Plain Fries.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Garlic Parm, combo with Plain Fries. Is that all?
Actually switch the fries to Nashville Seasoning Fries.

I found a few matches for "Plain Fries" — did you mean "2 Chicken Sandos & Fries", "1 Chicken Tender and Fries", "2 Chicken Tenders & Fries"? I found a few matches for "Nashville Seasoning Fries" — did you mean "Animal Fries", "Regular Fries"?
Change the flavor to Hot Honey.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Hot Honey, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries. Is that all?
Wait no—make it Spicy Garlic Parm instead.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries. Is that all?
Also make them grilled not fried.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries. Is that all?
Add a side of Regular Fries too.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries, and a side of Regular Fries. Is that all?
For the Regular Fries seasoning: Salt and Pepper.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries, and a side of Regular Fries with Salt and Pepper. Is that all?
Add Buffalo sauce and Ranch.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries, a side of Regular Fries with Salt and Pepper, plus Buffalo sauce and Ranch. Is that all?
Add one Chili Mango sauce as well.

So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries, a side of Regular Fries with Salt and Pepper, plus Buffalo sauce, Ranch, and one Chili Mango sauce. Is that all?
Add a Can Diet Coke.

So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries, a side of Regular Fries with Salt and Pepper, plus Buffalo sauce, Ranch, one Chili Mango sauce, and a Can Diet Coke. Is that all?
And throw in a bottle of water.
I found a few matches for "bottle of water" — did you mean "Hot Dog"?
Also add Cookies 'N Cream cookie.
Got it! I've added 1x Cookies 'N Cream to your order. I found a few matches for "bottle of water" — did you mean "Hot Dog"?
Remove the extra Regular Fries.

So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Nashville Seasoning Fries, plus Buffalo sauce, Ranch, one Chili Mango sauce, a Can Diet Coke, and 1x Cookies 'N Cream. Is that all?
Make the combo fries Cajun Fries now.

Updated 6Pc Boneless: now 1× (Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled) I found a few matches for "Nashville Seasoning Fries" — did you mean "Animal Fries", "Regular Fries"? "Regular Fries" not found in your order.
Add Mozzarella Sticks.

So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Cajun Fries, plus Buffalo sauce, Ranch, one Chili Mango sauce, a Can Diet Coke, 1x Cookies 'N Cream, and 1x Mozzarella Sticks. Is that all?
Actually cancel the Mozzarella Sticks.
So you've got: 1x 6Pc Boneless with Spicy Garlic Parm, grilled, combo with Cajun Fries, plus Buffalo sauce, Ranch, one Chili Mango sauce, a Can Diet Coke, and 1x Cookies 'N Cream. Is that all?
Ok done.
